entries.value: Restore 30% maximum health over 0.4 seconds; shared potion cooldown 2 seconds; stack cap 6; consumed on use.
Health 6 + 1.00 per item level; armor 2 + 0.30 per item level; movement -3%.
Health 8 + 1.00 per item level; armor 1 + 0.22 per item level. Major or Severe direct hits grant a 5 + item level barrier for 3 seconds; 12-second cooldown; cannot retrigger while active.
Health 14 + 1.80 per item level; armor 0.5 + 0.10 per item level.
Health 6 + 0.80 per item level; armor 0.05 per item level; movement +4%.
Health 10 + 1.40 per item level; armor 0.5 + 0.10 per item level; Bleed, Frostbind, Silence, Hex, and Guardbreak duration -12%. Exhaustion and encounter Marked are unaffected.
Health 6 + 0.80 per item level; armor 0.5 + 0.08 per item level; resistance 4.0% + 0.30% per item level; healing received -8%.
After 2 seconds without a primary release, the next release deals +15% direct damage; consumed on hit or miss.
Bleed, Frostbind, Silence, Hex, and Guardbreak duration -10%. Exhaustion and encounter Marked are unaffected.
Minimum item level 7; Grave Mark lasts 6 seconds, grants +20% primary damage against its target, and deals 1.45W direct damage.
Minimum item level 1; no Grave Arbalist kit change; starter relic.
Minimum item level 4; Grave Mark range 13 tiles, projectile speed 15 tiles per second, and direct damage 1.55W.
Minimum item level 10; Slipstep travels 2.5 tiles over 220 milliseconds with 20% direct-damage reduction and a 9-second cooldown.
Minimum item level 4; damage scalar 0.84; 382-millisecond interval; range 8.5 tiles; projectile speed 14 tiles per second.
Minimum item level 10; damage scalar 0.82; 520-millisecond interval; range 7.5 tiles; three bolts at -12, 0, and +12 degrees; maximum one hit per target per release.
Minimum item level 7; damage scalar 1.10; 550-millisecond interval; range 11.5 tiles; projectile speed 17 tiles per second; radius 0.09 tiles.
Minimum item level 1; damage scalar 1.00; 454.545-millisecond interval; range 9.5 tiles; projectile speed 14 tiles per second; radius 0.10 tiles; starter weapon.
